scripts.prebuild: mkdir -p db media .backups && node scripts/checkpoint-db.mjs && if [ -s db/payload.db ]; then ts=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S) && cp db/payload.db .backups/payload.db.$ts && [ -f db/payload.db-wal ] && cp db/payload.db-wal .backups/payload.db-wal.$ts; echo '✅ DB backed up'; fi
scripts.build: payload generate:importmap && next build && { if [ -f db/payload.db ] && [ ! -s db/payload.db ]; then echo '❌ DB is 0 bytes after build — restoring backup'; cp "$(ls -t .backups/payload.db.* 2>/dev/null | head -1)" db/payload.db 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Restored from backup' || echo '⚠️ No backup found'; fi; } && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public .next/standalone/public && ln -sf ../../db .next/standalone/db && ln -sf ../../media .next/standalone/media
